response:

| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

I’m considering the title “Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary (2026-04-08)” for the report, which uses the current date—2026-04-08—from the system. That seems good! However, I think it's important to wait for approval before sending any emails related to this report. Making sure I have the go-ahead first is definitely the right approach.
